name: Oreo Cookie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup capacity Bundt pan.
3. Chop Oreos into quarters and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
5. In a large bowl, beat butter until soft. Add vanilla and almond extracts and sugar. Beat well.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. On low speed, alternate adding the dry ingredients with the sour cream in three additions.
8. Place about 1 1/2 cups of the mixture into the pan. Form a shallow trench with a spoon.
9. Gently fold in the Oreo pieces to mix them with the batter.
10. Pour the remaining batter over the plain batter in the pan.
11. Bake for 1 hour.
12. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then invert the cake onto a rack to finish cooling.
13. When cool, top with glaze.
14. For the glaze, melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler. Stir in cream gradually until the mixture is thick and just barely thin enough to flow. Pour around the top of the cake and let dribble down the sides.
